name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn

(* State variables *)

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ (* Process p attempts to enter critical section *)
          /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = "idle"
                            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
                            /\ turn' = turn
          \/ (* Process p enters critical section *)
          /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = "trying"
                            /\ turn = p
                            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
                            /\ turn' = turn
          \/ (* Process p exits critical section *)
          /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = "critical"
                            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
                            /\ turn' = turn

(* Invariant: at most one process is in critical section *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N
          /\ \A p, q \in 1..N : (p /= q) => (state[p] # "critical" \/ state[q] # "critical")

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Participants

VARIABLES participantStates, messages, coordinatorState
TypeOK ==
  /\ coordinatorState \in {"Init", "Prepare", "Commit", "Abort"}
  /\ participantStates \in [Participants -> {"Init", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]
  /\ messages \in [Participants -> {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
  /\ coordinatorState = "Init"
  /\ participantStates = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
  /\ messages = [p \in Participants |-> "Prepare"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  /\ coordinatorState' = 
       IF coordinatorState = "Init" /\ \A p \in Participants : messages[p] = "Prepare"
       THEN "Prepare"

       THEN "Commit"

       THEN "Abort"

  /\ participantStates' = 
       [p \in Participants |-> 
          IF messages[p] = "Prepare" /\ participantStates[p] = "Init"
          THEN "VoteYes"

          THEN "VoteNo"

          THEN "Commit"

          THEN "Abort"

  /\ messages' = 
       [p \in Participants |-> 
          IF coordinatorState' = "Commit" /\ messages[p] = "Prepare"
          THEN "Commit"

          THEN "Abort"

  /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<coordinatorState, participantStates, messages>> ==

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
          /\ forks' = forks
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![i+1] = i]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks *)
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![i+1] = -1]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES num, flag


  flag: [1..N -> BOOLEAN]  (* choosing flag *)

actions
  choose(i) == 




  enter(i) == 
    \A j \in 1..N : 
      (j # i) => 
        (flag[j] /\ (num[j] < num[i] \/ (num[j] = num[i] /\ j < i)))

  exit(i) == 


  Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N : 
      (choose(i) \/ 
       (enter(i) /\ exit(i)))

  Init == 
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : num[i] = 0 /\ flag[i] = FALSE

  TypeOK == 
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : num[i] \in 0..N
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : flag[i] \in BOOLEAN

  Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

(* TypeOK ensures that q is a sequence of length K, head and tail are integers in 0..K-1, and count is an integer in 0..K *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(K)
  /\ head \in 0..K-1
  /\ tail \in 0..K-1
  /\ count \in 0..K

(* The queue is represented as a sequence of length K, with head and tail indices indicating the positions for dequeue and enqueue, respectively. *)
Init == 
  /\ q = <<>>
  /\ head = 0
  /\ tail = 0
  /\ count = 0

(* The producer action enqueues an element when the queue is not full. *)
Producer == 
  /\ count < K
  /\ q' = Append(q, x)  (* x is the element to enqueue *)
  /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
  /\ count' = count + 1
  /\ head' = head

(* The consumer action dequeues an element when the queue is not empty. *)
Consumer == 
  /\ count > 0
  /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
  /\ tail' = tail
  /\ count' = count - 1
  /\ q' = q

(* Next action is nondeterministic choice between Producer and Consumer. *)
Next == 
  \/ Producer
  \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>> /\ TypeOK

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>> \\
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
          /\ \E r \in Readers \\\\ /\ r \in readers \\
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
             /\ readers' = readers \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
             /\ \E r \in Readers \\\\ /\ r \notin readers \\
             /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
                /\ readers' = readers \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
             /\ \E r \in Readers \\\\ /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
                /\ readers' = readers \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
             /\ \E r \in Readers \\\\ /\ r \notin readers \\
             /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
                /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES file, chunks, sent, retransmitCount, acked, lost

MAX_RETRIES == 3

Init == /\ file \in Seq
       /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Len(file) |-> [chunk \in file[i] |-> [sent \in FALSE, acked \in FALSE, retransmitCount \in 0]]]
       /\ sent = [i \in 1..Len(file) |-> [j \in 1..Len(file[i]) |-> FALSE]]
       /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..Len(file) |-> [j \in 1..Len(file[i]) |-> 0]]
       /\ acked = [i \in 1..Len(file) |-> [j \in 1..Len(file[i]) |-> FALSE]]
       /\ lost = [i \in 1..Len(file) |-> [j \in 1..Len(file[i]) |-> FALSE]]

SendChunk == /\ \E i \in 1..Len(file) : \E j \in 1..Len(file[i]) :
              /\ sent[i][j] = FALSE
              /\ retransmitCount[i][j] < MAX_RETRIES
              /\ sent' = [sent EXCEPT ![i][j] = TRUE]
              /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i][j] = retransmitCount[i][j] + 1]
              /\ acked' = [acked EXCEPT ![i][j] = FALSE]
              /\ lost' = [lost EXCEPT ![i][j] = FALSE]
              /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks>>

AckChunk == /\ \E i \in 1..Len(file) : \E j \in 1..Len(file[i]) :
              /\ acked[i][j] = FALSE
              /\ acked' = [acked EXCEPT ![i][j] = TRUE]
              /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sent, retransmitCount, lost>>

DropChunk == /\ \E i \in 1..Len(file) : \E j \in 1..Len(file[i]) :
              /\ sent[i][j] = TRUE
              /\ acked[i][j] = FALSE
              /\ lost[i][j] = FALSE
              /\ lost' = [lost EXCEPT ![i][j] = TRUE]
              /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sent, retransmitCount, acked>>

Next == SendChunk \/ AckChunk \/ DropChunk

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sent, retransmitCount, acked, lost>>

====
